notes: UNFROZEN by #599 (was: frozen, daemon incapable — the model lived only in the unread <uuid>.json sidecar; the prior spec documented exactly this unblock). The recording launches `kiro-cli chat --trust-all-tools --model claude-haiku-4.5` (driver settings.model knob); the parser reads session_state.rts_model_state at turn_done via the TranscriptPathAware seam and sets ModelName from model_id and ContextWindow from context_window_tokens (200000 — sidecar-supplied, no capacity lookup), plus a derived Tokens.Total = context_usage_percentage/100 × window so context utilization reproduces kiro's own number. The phase DSL asserts the state arc; the model/context assertions are evidenced by the events.jsonl / staged-replay payload AFTER turn_end: model_name = 'claude-haiku-4.5' (the pinned launch id, kiro's own dotted label — asserted as non-unknown identity, not capacity-table membership). cost stays 0 (no LiteLLM pricing for kiro's dotted label; cost is not asserted). Replay reproduces the metrics only because the fixture carries transcript.json (the sidecar) next to transcript.jsonl.

text: Turn completes back to ready; SessionMetrics.ModelName = 'claude-haiku-4.5' (the pinned launch model, not 'unknown', not 'auto') and ContextWindow = 200000 from the sidecar rts_model_state
